commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh The LORD said also unto me in the days of Josiah the king, Have you seen that which backsliding Israel has done. she has gone up upon every high mountain and under every green tree, and there has played the harlot. Days, before the 18th year. God now pronounces sentence (Calmet) on all. (Haydock) Rebellious, a faithless wife. The kingdom of Israel gave way to idolatry first. But the people were less favoured than Juda, which had many prophets and good kings, the temple Moreover, the misfortunes of Israel did not open the eyes of their brethren. (Calmet) Both the ten tribes, and the two tribes (Worthington) which adhered to the line of David, prevaricated.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
